text: refactor side panel vs. modal - maybe use the same code? just modal vs side panel?
description: Decision: do not reuse one complete form. Keep the graph side panel as a persistent inspect/navigate surface with narrow immediate-save edits; keep modals transactional and staged. Refactor shared typed data-store mutations first (aim metrics, then connection update/removal), and share only small presentational controls where duplication is real. See meta/ui-side-panel-modal-analysis.md.
reflection: Kept panel and modal as separate presentation/state surfaces. Added typed data-store actions for connection detail updates and removal, including optimistic local updates and rollback on failure. Routed GraphSidePanel and ConnectionDetailsModal through the shared connection API; side-panel metrics already route through dataStore.updateAim. Updated focused tests for the store contract. Verification: 34 focused tests pass, production frontend build passes, git diff --check passes.

status.comment: Decision and shared mutation refactor complete; ready to show the user.
